examples: He was a good man, but always forebear his wrath and complaint.
It's much larger than its 75 forebear. Perhaps it could be the 75 OS.
Our forebear might even teach us a few old tricks that could be used to help the living.
Like Abraham, he is supranational, the forebear of both the French and the Germans.
He showed me the scapula of an aurochs, an extinct forebear of domestic cattle, weighing more than two thousand pounds.
